fields.implementation_summary: Current checkout no longer reproduces the WgpuOverlay unreachable trap; targeted release Playwright regression passed 4/4 runs with no JS errors
fields.title: ticket-viewer WgpuOverlay panics with `unreachable` when overlay enabled (default-ON regression)

fields.implementation_summary: Current checkout still does not reproduce the WgpuOverlay unreachable trap. Fresh-server targeted release Playwright rerun passed 5/5. Full ticket-viewer release suite kept the GPU-overlay toggle path green, but two unrelated graph tests failed with HTTP 500s in graph-detail-sidebar.spec.ts and graph3d-right-drag.spec.ts.
